name: folio
description: A lightweight, themeable Markdown editor & viewer with a Typora-like look — edit the source, preview it rendered, swap CSS themes (Typora-theme compatible).

scripts.start: npm run ensure:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron .
scripts.dist: npm run ensure:electron && npm run build:renderer && npm run prepare:wincodesign && npm run clean:release && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js
scripts.dist:win: npm run ensure:electron && npm run build:renderer && npm run prepare:wincodesign && npm run clean:release && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run ensure:electron && npm run build:renderer && npm run clean:release && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run ensure:electron && npm run build:renderer && npm run clean:release && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --linux
